channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nepal Engages UK and China for Dialogue on Lipulekh Pass Dispute with India
item.description: Nepal's Prime Minister Balendra Shah, addressing the Parliament for the first time since taking office, announced that his government is engaging not only India but also the United Kingdom and China t...

item.title: Fernando Tatis Jr hits first home run of the season after 55-game drought
item.description: San Diego Padres star Fernando Tatis Jr finally broke his 55-game home run drought, the second-longest for a player who hits 40 or more home runs in a season. On May 30, 2026, Tatis hit a solo home ru...

item.title: Zimmerman residents rebuild neglected community road through collective effort
item.description: Residents of Zimmerman in Nairobi County have taken matters into their own hands to repair a long-neglected road that had become almost impassable, especially during rainy seasons. For years, the comm...

item.title: Prime Minister orders crackdown on corruption and recovery of misused public funds in Manyoni
item.description: Tanzania’s Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba has announced strong government action against corruption, ordering immediate investigations, arrests, and disciplinary measures following alleged embezzle...

item.title: Johannesburg Council and Treasury Disagree Over Municipal Wage Agreement
item.description: The City of Johannesburg and the National Treasury are in a serious standoff over a R10.3 billion wage deal signed last year with municipal workers. Mayor Dada Morero and Deputy Mayor Loyiso Masuku in...

item.title: Kwankwaso expresses confidence in Peter Obi’s chances ahead of 2027 election
item.description: Former presidential candidate under the New Nigeria Peoples Party (NNPP), Senator Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso, don publicly show strong belief say Peter Obi, wey dey run under Nigeria Democratic Congress (ND...

item.title: Demographic shifts and voter trends make Texas Senate race more competitive for Republicans
item.description: Republicans are increasingly concerned about the political future of Texas as demographic and electoral changes make the traditionally conservative state appear more competitive in upcoming Senate ele...

item.title: ASAP XP artists deliver live performance of SB19’s “Go Up” at Araneta Coliseum
item.description: The ASAP XP stage featured a high-energy live performance of SB19’s hit song “Go Up” at the Big Dome, officially known as the Araneta Coliseum. The segment highlighted several ASAP XP stars who came t...

item.title: Physician questions frequency and interpretation of Trump’s cognitive screening results
item.description: A physician appearing on MS NOW on Sunday raised concerns about former President Donald Trump’s recent claims regarding his cognitive testing, suggesting that the circumstances surrounding the exams m...

item.title: Salim Baabde Elected Chairman of TAOMAC as Oil Industry Faces Supply and Regulatory Challenges
item.description: Salim Baabde, a director from Amsons Group, has been elected as the new chairman of the Tanzania Association of Oil Marketing Companies (TAOMAC). This happened during the 26th Annual General Meeting h...

item.title: Casey McLean shines as Penrith narrowly defeat Warriors after Origin cameo
item.description: Casey McLean has enjoyed a remarkable week, first impressing in his NSW Origin debut and then starring for Penrith in a nail-biting 20-18 victory over the New Zealand Warriors. The 20-year-old scored ...

item.title: Socceroos edged 1-0 by Mexico in opening World Cup warm-up in Los Angeles
item.description: The Socceroos have begun their preparations for the 2026 FIFA World Cup with a narrow 1-0 defeat to Mexico in a friendly match at the Rose Bowl Stadium in Los Angeles. In front of a heavily Mexican-su...

item.title: Montreal Victoire honoured with downtown parade following Walter Cup championship victory
item.description: The Montreal Victoire marked their Walter Cup championship victory with a celebratory parade through downtown Montreal, drawing fans and supporters to the city’s streets to honour the team’s achieveme...

item.title: Arteta urges Arsenal leadership to act quickly after Champions League final defeat to PSG
item.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has called on the club’s hierarchy to make fast, smart, and bold decisions if the team is to continue its progress after a painful Champions League final defeat to Paris S...

item.title: Nancy Mace criticized by allies and opponents after public appeal for Trump’s support
item.description: Republican Representative Nancy Mace drew criticism from both supporters of former President Donald Trump and her political opponents after publicly emphasizing her loyalty to him in a recent social m...

item.title: Snowbird alumni urge government to scale back aerobatic performances to prevent full suspension of the team
item.description: Former pilots of the Royal Canadian Air Force's Snowbirds aerobatic team are advocating for the government to maintain the iconic demonstration squadron by reducing the scale of its performances rathe...

item.title: Tanzania Sets Oversight and Accountability Measures to Support Vision 2050 Implementation
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has presented a structured plan to guide and protect the implementation of its National Vision 2050, which aims to transform the country into a middle-income economy with im...

item.title: Marta Kostyuk entertains spectators during Iga Swiatek’s break
item.description: During a tennis event, Ukrainian player Marta Kostyuk took centre stage by entertaining the crowd while fellow competitor Iga Swiatek took a break from the match. Fans at the venue were treated to Kos...

item.title: Six Students Identified in Utumishi Girls Dormitory Fire Investigation
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has confirmed that six students have been positively identified as suspects in the tragic dormitory fire at Utumishi Girls Senior Secondary School that...

item.title: Danielle Smith outlines reasons for cautious trust in Mark Carney amid Alberta–Ottawa energy talks
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith discusses her evolving relationship with federal leadership, particularly her expressed willingness to trust Prime Minister Mark Carney in contrast to previous prime min...
